scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const root=path.resolve('src');const walk=(d)=>fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((dent)=>dent.name.startsWith('.')||dent.name==='node_modules'?[]:dent.isDirectory()?walk(path.join(d,dent.name)):dent.isFile()&&dent.name.endsWith('.js')?[path.join(d,dent.name)]:[]);const files=walk(root);for(const file of files){const r=spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',file],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status||1)}console.log('Build check passed for '+files.length+' JavaScript files.');"
